# connections()

**Instance Method**

Returns the session’s set of MIDI network connections.

## Declaration

```swift
func connections() -> Set<MIDINetworkConnection>
```

## Return Value

The set of connections.

## Managing Connections

- **addConnection(_:)**: Adds a new connection to this session.
- **removeConnection(_:)**: Removes a connection from this session.
